hbusdesc: A & E Plastik Pak Inc. is a commodity chemicals company. It is headquartered in the United States.

AAI Corporation, along with its subsidiaries, designs, develops, manufactures, and supports aerospace and defense technologies. It offers unmanned aircraft systems, micro air vehicles, remote video terminals, ground control stations, and portable ground control stations.
